name: brna-monorepo
description: Bring React Native Agent-friendly — monorepo root

scripts.build:packages: bun run build:schema && bun --filter '@brna/runtime' build && bun --filter '@brna/metro-plugin' build && bun --filter '@brna/expo-plugin' build && bun --filter '@brna/cli' build && bun --filter '@brna/mcp' build
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build:packages && bun run smoke:package-entrypoints
